parameters.name: tsanet_username
parameters.description: TSANet API username (email of your dedicated TSANet API user)

parameters.name: field_id_token
parameters.description: Zendesk numeric Field ID for TSANet Token (Admin Center > Tickets > Fields)

parameters.name: field_id_tokens_multi
parameters.description: Zendesk numeric Field ID for TSANet Tokens Multi (optional)

parameters.name: field_id_status
parameters.description: Zendesk numeric Field ID for TSANet Status (Admin Center > Tickets > Fields)

parameters.name: field_id_partner
parameters.description: Zendesk numeric Field ID for TSANet Partner (Admin Center > Tickets > Fields)

parameters.name: field_id_respond_by
parameters.description: Zendesk numeric Field ID for TSANet Respond By (Admin Center > Tickets > Fields)
